name: @quoin/vocab-headless
description: Headless UI-flavoured primitives — listbox, combobox, menu, disclosure-group, transition frame.

attribution.harvestNotes: Translates Headless UI's componentless-component patterns into Quoin semantic primitives. The implementation pack supplies the styling; Headless UI's behaviour-only abstraction is honoured by emitting plain elements with the right ARIA shape.
